Task.Name: 0.4 QG0 - Intake Approval
Task.Notes: Resources: PMO + Steering | Project formally approved

Task.Name: 1.4 QG1 - Concept Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: PMO + Steering | Concept phase approved

Task.Name: 3.5 QG2&3 - Build & Test Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: PMO + QA | Build phase complete, ready for UAT

Task.Name: 4.3 QG4 - Pre-GoLive Approval
Task.Notes: Resources: PMO + Steering | QG4 gate passed; ready for final cutover checks

Task.Name: 5.1 GoLive - Day 1 Cutover
Task.Notes: Resources: PMO + Ops Team | Production go-live

Task.Name: 5.2 Hypercare & Stabilization (90 days)
Task.Notes: Resources: Support Team + SMEs | 90-day post-GoLive support

Task.Name: 6.4 QG5 - Project Completion
Task.Notes: Resources: PMO + Steering | Project formally closed
